MOTION /Amended To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Complaint Within Two Years (Change Of Hearing Date)
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PEP BOYS MANNY MOE & JACK OF CALIFORNIA MOTION to Dismiss for Failure to Serve Complaint within two years. Marilou R. Bustonera, of Selman Breitman LLP (415) 979-0400, appearing for defendant and Moving party; Matthew L. Zelasko-Barrett, of Brayton Purcell LLC, (415) 898-1555, appearing for Plaintiffs and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. Improper motion for reconsideration (CCP section 1008). To the extent the motion is based on improper use of the Doe procedure, that is not a basis for a motion to dismiss absent a showing that the claims against the defendant are time-barred. Request for sanctions denied. The Court adds: 583.410 or 583.420 do not apply. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

MOTION To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Complaint Within Two Years
Off Calendar Jun-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE PEP BOYS MANNY MOE & JACK OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO SERVE COMPLAINT WITHIN TWO YEARS [CCP SECTIONS 474, 583.410 and 583.420].
APPEARANCES: Katherine Allen, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, LLP 898-1555 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion to dismiss denied. The motion was filed with insufficient notice. CRC 3.1342. To the extent the motion is based on improper use of the Doe procedure, that is not a basis for a motion to dismiss absent a showing that the claims against the defendant are time-barred. Order signed in open court. (302/HEK/HEK) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
